editUrl: false
title: useDeprecatedDate
description: Learn more about useDeprecatedDate
---

## Summary
- Rule available since: `v2.2.6`
- Diagnostic Category: [`lint/suspicious/useDeprecatedDate`](/reference/diagnostics#diagnostic-category)
- This rule isn't recommended, so you need to enable it.
- This rule doesn't have a fix.
- The default severity of this rule is [**warning**](/reference/diagnostics#warning).
- Sources: 
  - Same as [`@graphql-eslint/require-deprecation-date`](https://the-guild.dev/graphql/eslint/rules/require-deprecation-date)

## How to configure
```json title="biome.json"
{
	"linter": {
		"rules": {
			"suspicious": {
				"useDeprecatedDate": "error"
			}
		}
	}
}

```
## Description
Require the `@deprecated` directive to specify a deletion date.

Suggests removing deprecated code when the due date has been passed.

## Examples

### Invalid

```graphql
query {
  member @deprecated(reason: "Use `members` instead") {
    id
  }
}
```

<pre class="language-text"><code class="language-text">code-block.graphql:2:10 <a href="https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/use-deprecated-date">lint/suspicious/useDeprecatedDate</a>  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">Add a &#96;deletionDate&#96; argument to the directive.</span>  </code></pre>

### Valid

```graphql
query {
  member @deprecated(reason: "Use `members` instead", deletionDate: "2099-12-25") {
    id
  }
}
```
